title: linux-firmware bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[20250909-999.44.git260ff424.el9]
- Rewrite the script to accomodate yum-based installs [Orabug: 38409589]

[20241003-999.35.git95bfe086.el9]
- Rebase to latest upstream [Orabug: 37132142]

[20230516-999.27.git6c9e0ed5.el9]
- Update firmware for qat_4xxx devices [Orabug: 35811008]
